title: Sword-a cool
description: Textures for sword pvp. Diamond and Netherite. Plus textures for some foods. All 64x.
body: This pack is made for all modes sword-related. The texturepack adds 64x textures that look great for pvp. Diamond armor and sword are both pink and for Netherite it's dark blue. It looks really clean to play with and I'll probably update it within the next month to incude some more cool retextures.
